changes.reason: Move call-wall acceptance persistence from 45 to the top grid value. The worst call-wall tail had enough convex payoff to protect, but it tied capital for 120 minutes; longer acceptance is the cleanest legal way to require more wall confirmation without globally pruning pullback/charm-pin winners.

Raise call-volume expansion from 0.10 to 0.15 for the option-confirmed call-wall entry path. This tests whether the two-trade call-wall sleeve needs stronger live call-flow expansion before accepting wide-target continuation risk.
Tighten the call-wall net DEX floor from 1.0B to the grid value 1.5B so only heavier dealer-flow regimes can trigger this tail-heavy but profitable profile.

Keep the current promoted 0.08 forward-DEX ratio rather than relaxing it; combined with higher DEX volume and call expansion, this isolates stronger call-wall acceptance without touching other VALID_0DTE profiles.

expected_effect: Should reduce or eliminate weak call-wall acceptance attempts, targeting lower worst MAE and shorter hidden recovery exposure while preserving the core pullback, squeeze, charm-pin, charm-wall, and 1DTE edges. Main tradeoff is that the call-wall sample is only two trades, so the stricter flow box may remove the $546 convex winner; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_044/run_050 or if score improvement is only MAE-through-deletion.
label: promote
rationale: Run one batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long experiment focused on option-flow persistence, not TP compression. The score leader has excellent net profit but the global worst MAE is concentrated in call_wall_acceptance_long: 2 trades, $640.5 PnL, $290/hour, but -655.2 worst MAE and a 120-minute recovery path. Prior call-wall TP containment was basically flat and did not improve MAE, so the next distinct mechanism is stricter pre-entry acceptance quality using legal call-wall/option-flow keys only.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long contributes 8.5% of total PnL from only 2 trades, but owns the -655.2 portfolio worst MAE. The worst row had strong forward DEX but delayed realization, so static TP changes did not separate risk; stronger acceptance and call-flow confirmation may.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call-Wall Flow Persistence Box
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample risk is high; tighter DEX and call-volume expansion can delete the largest single winner and suppress net profit without improving kept worst MAE.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE call-wall acceptance with positive forward DEX, accepted strike context, and demonstrably expanding call volume.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Global worst MAE improves toward <= -513.4, call_wall_acceptance_long retains at least 70% of PnL, total net profit remains >=98% of run_050, completed trades drop <=10%, and pnl_per_exposure_hour stays flat or better.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: The worst call-wall trade made early progress but reached full target only after deep adverse excursion; this path distinction is not directly available as a current config key.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Path-aware logic can overfit a two-trade profile and cut rare convex winners unless validated against protected fast winners and out-of-sample days.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: call_wall_acceptance_long with wide target or high ES-VWAP extension that fails to convert early favorable movement into sustained continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Call-wall worst MAE improves materially while retaining >=70% call-wall PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short 12.3-day, high-win-rate, take-profit-only SPX500 long scalper regime. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are absent, so the dominant risk is hidden MAE, long recovery p...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Early Progress Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves toward <= -513.4 and preferably <= -403 while retaining >=98% total PnL, >=90% affected-profile PnL, >=95% protected fast winners, and slow_12h remains 0.

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= $1315, 1DTE average/worst MAE improves, baseline breakout_long_1dte retained PnL is measured, total score flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Dormant Router Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or lowers combined charm/pin worst MAE while total PnL >=98% of leader and protected fast-winner retention >=95%.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Call-wall worst MAE improves materially, call-wall PnL retention >=70%, total PnL >=98% of leader, and no new slow trades.

next_experiments.config_bias: Study the enabled extended-VWAP rejection near-miss family with profile-aware micro-boundaries only. The optimizer should avoid broad ES-VWAP caps because protected extended-VWA...
next_experiments.name: Extended-VWAP Near-Miss Tail Repair
next_experiments.primary_metric: Worst MAE and total risk-adjusted score, with total PnL retention >=98% and protected extended-VWAP winner retention >=95%.

next_experiments.config_bias: Contain only call_wall_acceptance_long. Prefer persistence/realization tests over disabling the profile or shrinking all convex targets.
next_experiments.name: Call-Wall Acceptance Tail Containment
next_experiments.primary_metric: Global worst MAE, call_wall_acceptance_long PnL retention >=70%, total PnL retention >=98%, and no slow_12h trades.

next_experiments.config_bias: Research local weak-structure or poor early-quality boxes around pullback_long only; do not apply global setup-quality floors or broad structure-score gates.
next_experiments.name: Pullback Weak-Structure Heat Split
next_experiments.primary_metric: pullback_long worst MAE, pullback PnL retention >=90%, total PnL/hour flat or better, and score.

next_experiments.config_bias: Keep breakout_long_1dte baseline stable; if legal, test a companion one-dte pullback route rather than tightening existing breakout gates.
next_experiments.name: 1DTE Companion Split Validation
next_experiments.primary_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL, 1DTE average/worst MAE, breakout_long_1dte cannibalization, and total score.

next_experiments.config_bias: Run exactly one dormant valid-0DTE pin-avoid activation if the optimizer can replace the router list cleanly and attribute standalone PnL. Keep same-profile tuning minimal.
next_experiments.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Attribution Probe
next_experiments.primary_metric: Activated profile standalone PnL, combined charm/pin worst MAE, total PnL retention >=98%, protected fast-winner retention >=95%.

next_experiments.config_bias: Hold no-0DTE fallback conservative. Treat STALE_0DTE separately from EXPIRED_0DTE if possible; do not alter VALID_0DTE routing.
next_experiments.name: No-0DTE Fallback Efficiency Holdout
next_experiments.primary_metric: Fallback PnL/hour, fallback worst MAE, unchanged VALID_0DTE PnL/trade count, total PnL retention >=98%.
